value_metric: an official-identity verifier that assigns A0 only to central-government sources proven by official domain + host org / website ID code, refuses to enable unverified sources, and hard-blocks search/media from ever receiving A0 -- the guardrail that keeps the A0 pilot authoritative and prevents news noise from masquerading as official

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: verifier + rules only, not wired to the production enable flow; manual_review sources need a human decision; the live gov.cn/stats footer extraction ran from the dev env (0 cloud cost)
